records.ety: [Of unknown origin; possibly fr. F. par degrs by degrees, -- for a pedigree is properly a genealogical table which records the relationship of families by degrees; or, perh., fr. F. pied de grue crane's foot, from the shape of the heraldic genealogical trees.]

defs: A line of ancestors; descent; lineage; genealogy; a register or record of a line of ancestors.
quotes: Alterations of surnames . . . have obscured the truth of our pedigrees.
His vanity labored to contrive us a pedigree.
I am no herald to inquire of men's pedigrees.
The Jews preserved the pedigrees of their tribes.

defs: A record of the lineage or strain of an animal, as of a horse.
